data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Accessibility seating', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence or API responses provided that confirm the existence or functionality of accessibility seating within the system. This lack of evidence indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the requirement is not satisfied based on the available information.
gaps: No evidence of accessibility seating functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
